g.onclick: sendPrompt('Build a structured data ingestion connector: REST API polling, FTP drop, S3 bucket listener. Include auth rotation, rate limit handling, retry with exponential backoff, schema versioning, and dead-letter queue for failed records.')

sendPrompt('Build an unstructured data ingestion system: web scraper with JS rendering (Playwright), PDF parser, satellite image downloader, audio/video transcription pipeline. Include politeness throttling, robots.txt compliance layer, and proxy rotation.')

sendPrompt('Build a real-time streaming data ingestion layer: Kafka consumer for tick data and news feeds, WebSocket handler for order book data, low-latency timestamp alignment, out-of-order event handling, and exactly-once processing semantics.')

sendPrompt('Build a satellite and geospatial data ingestion pipeline: downloading Planet Labs, Maxar, or Sentinel-2 imagery, raster processing with GDAL, object detection models for counting cars/tanks/ships, time-series feature extraction from repeat-pass imagery.')

sendPrompt('Build the data normalisation and quality layer: timestamp alignment to exchange time, survivorship bias scrubbing, outlier detection and Winsorisation, point-in-time correctness enforcement (no look-ahead), corporate action adjustment, currency normalisation, missing data imputation strategies.')
g.text: timestamp align · survivorship scrub · look-ahead prevention · outlier clip · PIT correctness

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Build the NLP feature extraction pipeline for alt-data text: earnings call transcript sentiment, SEC filing language complexity, news event classification, entity extraction linking companies to supply chain events. Include FinBERT fine-tuning, embedding generation, and real-time inference serving.')

sendPrompt('Build the computer vision and geospatial feature extraction layer: satellite image change detection, car count regression models, oil tank shadow measurement, port congestion scoring. Include model versioning, confidence scoring, and drift detection for when models degrade.')
g.text: change detection · object count · shadow measure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the feature store architecture for a quantitative hedge fund: point-in-time correct feature retrieval, online (low-latency) and offline (batch) serving, feature versioning, backfill capability, feature lineage tracking, and the API contract that research and production systems share. What technology stack — Feast, Tecton, custom? Trade-offs?')
g.text: versioned · backfillable · online + offline serving · lineage tracked · PIT-correct

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the feature store feed the signal discovery engine? What is the exact API contract: feature request by symbol + timestamp, batch feature matrix for backtesting, streaming feature updates for live trading? Include latency SLAs and consistency guarantees.')

sendPrompt('How does the feature store feed the live trading system? What are the latency requirements for feature retrieval in production? How do you handle feature staleness, partial data, and graceful degradation when an alt-data feed goes down mid-session?')

sendPrompt('How do you build the backtesting harness that uses the feature store? Key requirements: strict point-in-time correctness, no look-ahead bias, realistic transaction costs, slippage model, position limits, margin constraints. What does a production-grade backtest engine look like?')
